headline: Is EMCOR Group (EME) Still Attractively Priced After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether EMCOR Group's share price still makes sense after a strong multi year run, the key question now is how its current valuation compares with the underlying business. The stock most recently closed at US$776.72, with the share price up 21.6% year to date and 64.9% over the last year, even though it has fallen 7.5% in the past week and 16.6% over the past month. Recent news coverage has focused on EMCOR Group within broader discussions of US construction and...
